content.query:
select
cst.CustomerID
,cst.FirstName
,cst.LastName
,cst.Email
,cst.Phone
,cst.Address1
,cst.City
,cst.State
,cst.Zip
,lds.GrossSalesAmount
,lds.EntryDate
,lds.Sold
,prd.ProductName
from 
EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER cst
,EDW.FACT_LEAD lds
,EDW.DIM_PRODUCT prd
where 
lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
and lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
and prd.LongDescription like '%Bath%'
and prd.Active = 'True'
and lds.Sold = 'True'
and lds.EntryDate >= '2021-01-01'
